frothy build — resolve libraries and build the project's firmware

Build resolves the project's libraries from frothy.toml, generates the target sources, and runs make to produce the firmware image for the target named in the manifest. Missing git dependencies are fetched into the local cache first. Use it when you have changed library code or board settings and want to produce a flashable artifact without flashing it.

Examples:
  frothy build
      build the project in the current directory

Flags:
  -no-make
    	stop after generator emission; do not invoke make
  -project string
    	project directory containing frothy.toml (default ".")
